description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a bold, angular design with a predominantly blue and purple color scheme. The front panel displays a large screen with 'Pokémon Platinum Version' artwork, including a dramatic image of the legendary Pokémon Giratina. The control panel is equipped with two joysticks and multiple buttons, suggesting support for two players, and is finished in a matching blue tone. The side panels are teal and purple, with one side featuring a large, vibrant graphic of Ash Ketchum and Pikachu, adding a playful and thematic touch. The cabinet is constructed from solid panels, likely wood or MDF, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly. The overall build is sturdy and substantial, typical of classic arcade machines found in urban entertainment venues.
description: A blue and purple arcade game cabinet with Pokémon Platinum artwork, dual joysticks, and vibrant side graphics featuring Ash and Pikachu. The design is bold, glossy, and built for two players.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pokémon Platinum marquee, large display screen, and dual control panel with joysticks and buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the teal and purple panels, the angled cabinet profile, and the protruding control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large graphic of Ash Ketchum and Pikachu on a purple background, with no visible controls or screen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the teal and purple panels and the control panel's side profile.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen is flat, large, and has a visible bezel, but the display technology is not visually identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and six buttons arranged in two sets, side-by-side for two-player gameplay, with a blue control surface and no visible markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'Pokémon Platinum Version' text with Giratina artwork, using bold colors (blue, white, orange, yellow) and a dynamic, game-themed style.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: One side panel features a large, colorful graphic of Ash Ketchum and Pikachu on a purple background; the other side appears plain teal and purple with no additional artwork.
